zh.lifeSummary: 當Douce Venables於1396年出生在英國藍卡爾巴頓時，她的父親William Richard de Venables of Bollen20歲，母親Johanna Joan de Massey21歲。她於1409年5月3日與Sir Robert Booth在英國藍卡爾埃克爾斯結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1453年9月23日在她的家鄉享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾維爾姆斯洛福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Douce Venables于1396年出生在英国藍卡爾巴頓时，她的父亲William Richard de Venables of Bollen20岁，母亲Johanna Joan de Massey21岁。她于1409年5月3日与Sir Robert Booth在英国藍卡爾埃克爾斯结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1453年9月23日在她的家乡享年57岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾維爾姆斯洛福。

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Douce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dowse
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English douce, dowce ‘sweet, pleasant’ (Old French dolz, dous, later doux), or from the Middle English personal name Douce (borrowed from Old French Douce, Latin Dulcia, derived from Latin dulcis) with the same meaning. The name was sometimes used as a woman's personal name and occasionally used for a man. The modern name is mostly pronounced to rhyme with house but sometimes with loose, as indicated by the variant Duce.

en.lifeSummary: When Douce Venables was born in 1396, in Barton, Lancashire, England, her father, William Richard de Venables of Bollen, was 20 and her mother, Johanna Joan de Massey, was 21. She married Sir Robert Booth on 3 May 1409, in Eccles, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 23 September 1453, in her hometown, at the age of 57, and was buried in Wilmslow, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Douce Venables est née en 1396, à Barton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William Richard de Venables of Bollen, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Johanna Joan de Massey, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Booth le 3 mai 1409, à Eccles, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 septembre 1453, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Wilmslow, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Dunham, Chester, England: Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Douce Venables 1396 in Barton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Richard de Venables of Bollen 20 und ihre Mutter Johanna Joan de Massey 21. Sie hat am 3. Mai 1409 in Eccles, Lancashire, England Sir Robert Booth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. September 1453 im Alter von 57 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Wilmslow, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Douce Venables è nata il nel 1396 nel Barton, Lancashire, England, sua padre, William Richard de Venables of Bollen, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Johanna Joan de Massey, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Booth il 3 maggio 1409, nel Eccles, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 23 settembre 1453, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Wilmslow, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Douce Venablesが1396年にイギリスランカシュアイアバートンで生まれた時，父William Richard de Venables of Bollenは20歳，母Johanna Joan de Masseyは21歳であった。1409年5月3日にイギリスランカシュアイアエククレスでSir Robert Boothと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1453年9月23日に故郷で57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウィルムスロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Douce Venables(이)가 1396년 영국 랭카실르 바턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Richard de Venables of Bollen(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna Joan de Massey(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1409년 5월 3일 영국 랭카실르 c클스에서 Sir Robert Booth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1453년 9월 23일 그녀의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 윌슬로에 묻혔다.

pt.Dunham, Chester, England: Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Douce Venables nasceu em 1396, em Barton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Richard de Venables of Bollen, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Joan de Massey, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Booth em 3 de maio de 1409, em Eccles, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de setembro de 1453, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Wilmslow, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Dunham, Chester, England: Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Douce Venables родилась в 1396 г. в местности бартон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Richard de Venables of Bollen было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Joan de Massey, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Booth 3 мая 1409 г. в местности экклесь, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 23 сентября 1453 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности уилмслоу, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Douce Venables nació en 1396, en Barton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Richard de Venables of Bollen, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Johanna Joan de Massey, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Booth el 3 de mayo de 1409, en Eccles, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 23 de septiembre de 1453, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Wilmslow, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
